name: generate_strategic_recommendations
description: Generate strategic recommendations for master partnership
prompt:
Based on master profile and insights, generate strategic recommendations for better partnership.

Master Profile:
{{master_profile}}

Key Insights:
{{insights}}

Current Focus Areas:
{{focus_areas}}

Generate recommendations for:
1. How to better support the master
2. Capabilities to develop
3. How to anticipate master needs
4. Communication adaptations needed
5. Strategic priorities

Return as JSON:
{
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "category": "support|capabilities|anticipation|communication|priorities",
      "recommendation": "specific recommendation",
      "rationale": "why this matters",
      "expected_impact": "what will improve",
      "priority": "high|medium|low",
      "implementation_effort": "low|medium|high"
    }
  ],
  "strategic_priorities": ["priority1"],
  "next_steps": ["step1"]
}

Be strategic and specific.
Focus on high-impact recommendations.
Consider implementation feasibility.
